> ⚠️ **Vulnerability?** Do not use this template.  
> Report privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/photon2078/openclaw-docker-installer/security/advisories/new).

---

## Description

A clear description of the security concern (non-sensitive issues only — hardening suggestions, documentation gaps, etc.).

## Context

Where does this occur? Which part of the installer or generated configuration?

## Suggested improvement

What would make this more secure?
